# Security Policy

For the full security policy, threat model, security invariants, and vulnerability reporting instructions, see the main [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) in the package root.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

- **Email:** security@risaal.org
- **DO NOT** open public GitHub issues for security vulnerabilities
- **Expected response time:** 72 hours
- **PGP key:** Available at https://risaal.org/security.txt

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for full details on what to include in your report.
